Monthly Highlights
Instagram confirmed the results

Instagram's own monthly recap screens — showing the platform recognised exceptional performance in August and October.

August Recap
6.6K views · +786% from July · 80% non-followers
October Recap
43K views · +125% from September · 90% non-followers
Best single week
+417%
In one week: 8 reels + 30 posts → 1.5K views, up 417% from the previous week. Non-follower views hit 57% — up +832% — showing the content was breaking into brand-new audiences at scale.
Interactions Breakdown · Oct 3 – Nov 1
Posts drove 62.9% of all interactions
Likes20
Comments5
Saves9
Shares30
Posts contribution62.9%
